description: Fix card content clipping for short/medium content. Cards should auto-size naturally without maxHeight/overflow-hidden until they actually reach MAX_CARD_HEIGHT.
steps: Step 1: In the outer card container style (around line 4763-4766 in src/App.jsx), only apply maxHeight and overflow:hidden when nodeDims.height >= MAX_CARD_HEIGHT. For smaller cards, omit maxHeight entirely and let the card auto-size.

Step 2: In the content div (around line 4880-4882 in src/App.jsx), when nodeDims.height < MAX_CARD_HEIGHT, do NOT use overflow-hidden. Use overflow-visible or remove overflow restriction so content is fully visible.
Step 3: Verify npm run build succeeds.
acceptance_criteria: Short descriptions are fully visible without clipping
Cards auto-size naturally for small/medium content
Cards that exceed MAX_CARD_HEIGHT still cap height and enable scrolling
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run 'npm run build' and confirm it succeeds without errors
Verify that the outer card container only applies maxHeight when height >= MAX_CARD_HEIGHT
Verify that the content div does not use overflow-hidden for non-max cards
